calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer, for petitioner Lucy Demarchant.

The Court asked about the need to dispose of personal property of the estate. Ms. Baer reported that the only liquid assets located to date are two securities accounts, with the value of the securities steadily declining and producing no income Authorization to sell the securities was requested in order to prevent further loss to the estate. In response to the question from the Court as to whether the securities were generating any interest or dividends, Ms. Bare replied that they were not paying out either interest or dividends.
The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order), and stated he would be appointing a probate referee.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
